capacity_invariant: Default to maximum appropriate quality-preserving utilization. No quality degradation is permitted. Capacity may be reduced only by task-platform fit, quota state, resource contention, or explicit operator hold.

routes.notes: IDE-bound JR+ path; no headless lane contract exists.
known_unknowns: Antigrav limits and telemetry are unknown.

routes.notes: Default frontier Claude path; requires governed headless enable latch and a validated task.
known_unknowns: Subscription quota remains manually refreshed until telemetry adapter exists.

routes.notes: Use when architecture, governance, theory, or high-ambiguity work requires the strongest Claude profile.
known_unknowns: Account-live subscription quota remains manually refreshed until telemetry adapter exists.

routes.notes: Use only when Sonnet is quality-equivalent for the bounded task or Opus capacity is blocked.

routes.summary: Codex full-capability tmux lane with methodology bootstrap
routes.notes: Default Codex SOP: GPT-5.5 xhigh from the Codex launcher.
known_unknowns: OpenAI/Codex subscription quota is partly opaque; fallback selection needs a separate quota receipt.

routes.summary: Codex Spark quota-wall tmux lane with methodology bootstrap
routes.notes: Use only when full Codex quota is blocked and Spark is quality-equivalent for the bounded task.
known_unknowns: Quality-equivalence records are task-class-specific and absent from this seed row.
Fallback use cannot be justified by unknown quota state.

known_unknowns: Gemini CLI subscription ceilings are labels only, not account-live telemetry.
